Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce the Python code to construct an accepting Petri net for the described scenario. We need to place tokens for initial marking and final marking as per the example: initial marking at start place, final marking at sink place.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Well create places representing states between activities: likely we need a place per activity, and perhaps also places for start, end, and some conditions. List of activities: Claim Registration CR, Document Verification DV, Fraud Check FC, Claim Assessment CA, Approval AP, Payment P, Notification N, Closure CL. Also we might need places for loops: after DV if incomplete leads to RDS; after FC if doubts leads to II which can happen multiple times before CA.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - NE
Text: Simplify: Well have a place for each activity, plus maybe a place for Re-Document Submission and In-depth Investigation. Probably we need arcs labeled with activity names connecting places. Thus, we can define places: p_start source, p_CR, p_DV, p_FC, p_CA, p_AP, p_P, p_N, p_CL, also maybe p_RDS, p_II, p_end sink. Or we can embed these as part of the flow.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: Well then add arcs: p_start -> p_CR label Claim Registration. p_CR -> p_DV label Document Verification. p_DV -> p_FC label Fraud Check. p_FC -> p_CA label Claim Assessment. p_CA -> p_AP label Approval. p_AP -> p_P label Payment. p_P -> p_N label Notification. p_N -> p_CL label Closure. p_CL -> p_end maybe not needed but to close.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - NE
Text: For loops: - If documents incomplete after DV -> go back to p_RDS label Re-Document Submission, then from p_RDS back to p_DV retry. Actually scenario says: if documents are incomplete after DV, a re-submission of documents step occurs RDS before the process continues. So we can add arcs: p_DV -> p_RDS label Re-Document Submission, and p_RDS -> p_DV label Document Verification retry. - If FC raises doubts -> go to p_II label In-depth Investigation, and from p_II back to p_FC multiple times before proceeding to CA. So we add arcs: p_FC -> p_II label In-depth Investigation, and p_II -> p_FC label Fraud Check retry multiple times. Thus we need arcs accordingly.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to ensure to remove sink place? In example they removed sink place from net and deleted marking. They did petri_utils.remove_place net sink then del fm sink. But we are using p_end as sink, we could similarly remove place and delete marking if needed. The problem statement didnt require us to do that, but we can follow pattern. Thus after constructing we may also do: petri_utils.remove_place net p_end del fm p_end But they said they finally remove the sink place. It might be needed to demonstrate removing. Id include that for completeness. Thus final code includes removal.
